Annualizing the recent 7-day momentum (+23.24%) would yield ~172% annually, but this is clearly unsustainable. A more conservative approach assuming 40-45% annualized returns reflects the bull regime and recent strength while accounting for deceleration signals. Confidence is moderate (0.68) due to high uncertainty in mean reversion timing and the gap between recent momentum and underlying protocol fundamentals.
